economic_notes: Gas Bar and Convenience Store expansion underway ($4,107,953 invested as at March 31, 2020). Health Building expansion underway ($374,500 invested). CMHC Section 95 housing project in progress ($1,614,271). First Nation Finance Authority loan of $6,256,057 obtained during year. VLT program operated. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event.
notes: Fiscal year is 2020 (March 31, 2020). Bank indebtedness of $757,685 results in negative cash position of -$204,899. Prior year accumulated surplus at beginning of current year was $20,792,359 but end of prior year was $33,888,351 — the large prior year surplus ($13,095,992) was driven by $13,655,435 deferred revenue recognized from prior year (likely flood damage recovery). Six entities consolidated including VLT program, Gas Bar/Convenience Store, Housing Authority, Health Services, Waste and Water - PM Associates, and Band Administration. No schedule of remuneration provided. Net debt (not net financial assets) of $16,536,250 reported. Community and Economic Development segment includes Gas Bar/Store operations. Cash is negative due to bank indebtedness exceeding restricted cash.
